channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dangerous road marking, 18th April
item.description:
The roundabout at the Bexley Village end of the North Cray Road has changed recently. A turning leading to the power station has been removed/blocked. The road markings have not been properly removed from the road surface at this location. As result, a car veered across into my lane due to a partially removed hatch marking pained on the road surface. Could this be completely removed from the road surface therefore preventing cars changing lanes erratically due to confusing road markings please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Cray Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: NW6 7NG (near 25 Dunster Gardens), 18th April
item.description:
Street light not working outside NW6 7NG (near 25 Dunster Gardens). The lamp is located between our property and the neighbouring social housing. It has not been working for over 6 weeks. The area is now very dark at night, which raises safety concerns for residents and pedestrians. Please could this be inspected and repaired as a priority.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plympton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 18th April
item.description:
Pallet dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress, sofa, trolley , since Feb, 18th April
item.description:
It s been there since Feb attracting more fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Newacres Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins emptied, bin men left this mess behind, 18th April
item.description:
Bins emptied, bin men left this mess behind. This area is always a stinking mess. Not sure what caretakers are getting paid for. The inside stairs area is also disgusting

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aden Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cumberland Market NW1 near Third age centre, 18th April
item.description:
On the corner opposite the block of flats called Moreland the corner of the pavement is broken and the pavement slabs all cracked here due to a heavy vehicle. Very near the Third age centre on Cumberland Market. Lots of elder people use this corner to cross the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cumberland Market, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed abandoned smart car with missing wheel, 18th April
item.description:
This car has been here for months - missing wheel and untaxed - clearly been abandoned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lincoln Green Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shrub base of tree, 18th April
item.description:
Over growing will soon after cars meeting to let each other by

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clarence Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on double yellow lines, 18th April
item.description:
Hi, We have persistent issues with people parking on double yellow lines outside our block (City Walk Apartments, Forest Hill, London SE23 2AR). This has been an ongoing issue for years but due to another bar opening in the area recently, it has got worse. Eg. Considerable traffic issues, blocked pavements etc. The road being blocked has been the site of multiple accidents in the last 10 years and is a route used by emergency services, so these parking issues are a genuine safety issue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Perry Vale, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A deep pot hole, 18th April
item.description:
On this bend n/s of the Doddinghurst road there is a large deep pot hole.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light in alley by park entrance not working, 18th April
item.description:
Very dark section of path with no light working

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magpie Hall Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive amount of building materials in the road,, 18th April
item.description:
Not cordoned off, no skip, no lights. Very dangerous for motorists and pedestrians
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oak Tree Gardens, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bags rubbish strewn across road, 18th April
item.description:
Some black bin bags have been dumped, looks like a fox has got in them and one is now in the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkway, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose manhole cover., 18th April
item.description:
Loose manhole/drain cover in the road at the junction causing a loud banging noise when vehicles pass over it. Issue is frequent due to traffic and is disruptive. Cover appears to be moving under load and may require reseating or repair.Potential safety concern if condition worsens or becomes dislodged.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Copeland Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped shopping trolley, 18th April
item.description:
Dumped on junction of hither farm Road and Nelson Mandela Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hither Farm Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpet rolls and cardboard boxes, 18th April
item.description:
The rubbish has been there for about 5 days and the pile is growing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitehorse Mews, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Flytipped 2 mattresses, and boxes on drive and near bins, 18th April
item.description:
Flytipped 2 mattresses, and boxes on drive and near bins behind shops on Kempe road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kempe Road, Enfield

item.title: Fly tipped builders rubble, 18th April
item.description:
Van load of builders rubbled tipped in the middle arch of Rail Sidings rd causing obstruction.

item.title: Street light is day burning, 18th April
item.description:
Outside The Rising Sun pub 120 Loampit Vale. Street light column 2 is day burning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Loampit Vale, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged drain cover, 18th April
item.description:
The cover is damaged with large holes and the metal in the middle is only attached on one side and can be pushed inwards by hand - someone with a walking stick or in heels could get stuck or hurt walking over it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Page Heath Villas, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
